title: oerstedella pumila
intro: Oerstedella pumila is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the orchid family, commonly known as the "miniature orchid". This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Oerstedella pumila include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Oerstedella pumila include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties in traditional medicine.
